The Last House on the Left (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,752,215Details
International Box Office $13,774,028
Worldwide Box Office $46,526,243
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,214,533
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,659,891
Total $23,874,424
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,118,685 (43.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:70.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,401 opening theaters/2,402 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,228,866

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 13th, 2009 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: August 18th, 2009 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sadistic brutal violence including a rape and disturbing images, language, nudity and some drug use
Running Time: 110 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Car Accident, Dysfunctional Family, Fugitive / On the Run, Prison Break, Rape Revenge, Revenge, Torture Porn
Subgenre: Gorn or Splatter Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Rogue Pictures, Craven, Maddalena, Cunningham
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
